fields.name: termsAccepted
fields.label: I have read and understood the Terms & Conditions as set out on the website and social media pages.

fields.name: depositAccepted
fields.label: I agree to the holding of the security deposit. Any breakages or damage will be charged in accordance with the Terms & Conditions. The deposit amount will be discussed upon collection.

fields.name: accessNotes
fields.label: Steps, Narrow Corridors, or Obstructions
fields.placeholder: Please detail any access difficulties, steps, narrow corridors, or obstructions at the installation address.

fields.name: additionalComments
fields.label: Additional Comments
fields.placeholder: Any further information you would like us to be aware of.

fields.name: noMovementAccepted
fields.label: I understand that hired equipment must not be moved once installed. Any damage resulting from unauthorised movement will be the hirer's responsibility.

fields.name: damageResponsibility
fields.label: I accept full responsibility for all hired equipment during the hire period. Any damage, loss, or breakages must be paid for in full.
